title: Lace
description: One of most popular resouce pack from my discord server.
body:
# 🕸️ Lace Resource Pack — clean & stylish PvP textures 🕸️

**✨ Short Description**  
Lace is a smooth, performance-friendly PvP resource pack designed for players who love a clean look, high FPS, and stylish vibes 🌌. With custom swords, armor, particles, and a dreamy sky, it’s perfect for both competitive fights and casual play ⚔️.

---

## 💎 Features
- 🌠 Custom sky with soft pink/purple gradient.  
- 🗡️ Simplified sword and tool textures for easier combat focus.  
- 🛡️ Unique diamond & netherite armor recolors.  
- 💨 Optimized particles for clarity and less visual clutter.  
- ⚡ Lightweight 16×16 resolution — keeps FPS high even on low-end PCs.  

---

## 📥 Installation
1. ⬇️ Download the `.zip` from Modrinth.  
2. ⚙️ Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → “Open Pack Folder”.  
3. 📂 Place the zip inside (no need to unzip).  
4. 🔄 Enable the pack.

---

## 🔗 Compatibility
- 🖥️ Minecraft versions: **1.20 - 1.21.3**   
- ✅ Works with most PvP clients ([FoxClient](https://www.foxclient.eu), Badlion, Lunar, Feather, etc.).

---
